Skin, hair, and nail health services

## Skin Health is Our Masterpiece

At Al Sultan Premier Medical Center, skin health is our masterpiece. Our Dermatology Department blends advanced treatments with personalized care to address a spectrum of skin conditions. Whether it's managing acne, psoriasis, or pioneering anti-aging solutions, our experts use the latest techniques for your skin's health and beauty. Experience dermatological care that's as gentle as it is effective, where your skin's wellness is our top priority.

### Our Services

- Acne and rosacea treatment
- Skin cancer detection and treatment
- Mole removal and biopsy
- Eczema and psoriasis management
- Anti-aging treatments
- Laser hair removal
- Chemical peels and microdermabrasion

Comprehensive physiotherapy services for recovery and wellness

## Your Path to Recovery and Wellness

Al Sultan Premier Medical Center in Doha, Qatar, offers physiotherapy services. They have a dedicated physiotherapy clinic located in Al Kharaitiyath, offering a range of services including spine problem solutions, post-pregnancy rehabilitation, chronic muscle and pain management, sports injury recovery, neurological conditions care, and common bone injury treatment. They also offer specialized treatments like lymphatic drainage.
